summary_one_line_zh: 开放模型继续扩散，AI 代理的权限边界更危险了
summary_one_line_en: Open models spread, and AI agent boundaries look shakier.

items.title_zh: Meta AI 竟能代开高管IG权限
items.title_en: Meta AI helped grant Instagram access
items.why_zh: 这不是社工课，而是产品权限链条可被LLM绕过的实证，直接影响你家 agent 的授权设计。
items.why_en: A real-world proof that LLM-mediated permission flows can be bypassed, directly impacting agent auth design.
items.so_what_zh: 立刻复查你们所有“AI代办”流程的权限校验与高危操作二次确认。
items.so_what_en: Audit AI-assisted flows for auth checks and step-up confirmation on risky actions.

items.title_zh: JetBrains 推 12B MoE 编程模型 Mellum2
items.why_zh: IDE 厂商开始自带专用代码模型，说明“编辑器内模型”正在从插件时代转向内建竞争。
items.why_en: IDE vendors are now shipping native coding models, shifting the game from plugins to embedded model stacks.
items.so_what_zh: 评估你们的 coding assistant 是否该改成“编辑器原生 + 轻量专模”架构。
items.so_what_en: Reassess whether your coding assistant should move to editor-native, lightweight specialist models.

items.title_zh: Qwen3.6 35B 多模态无审查变体
items.why_zh: 开放权重继续朝更强多模态推进，但“更可用”也意味着更难控，适合做红队和安全基线。
items.why_en: Open weights keep improving in multimodal capability, but higher utility also raises control and safety stakes.
items.so_what_zh: 把它纳入你们的红队集，专测图文输入下的越权、泄露和拒答边界。
items.so_what_en: Add it to your red-team suite for multimodal jailbreaks, leakage, and refusal boundaries.
